children.text: a consortium of schools operated by the Bureau of Indian Education;
a school operated under a contract or grant with the Bureau of Indian Education in consortium with another contract or grant school or a tribal or community organization; or
a Bureau of Indian Education school in consortium with an institution of higher education, a contract or grant school, or a tribal or community organization,
